title: Pitrillistia

'''Pitrillistia''' was a remote terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] situated on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] periphery.<ref name="Galaxy7" /> It was a part of the [[Pitrillistia system/Legends|Pitrillistia system]], located in the [[Mieru'kar sector/Legends|Mieru'kar sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> within the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="New Territories" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Pitrillistia was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], [[Limb/Legends|bipedal]] [[Pitrillistian]] [[Species/Legends|species]], members of which spoke a mostly [[Pitrillistian language|musical language]] produced by their small wings.<ref name="Galaxy7" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pitrillistia was created by [[Desset Fabien]] through the "[[Design An Alien]]" competition run in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''.<ref name="Galaxy7" /> The competition, launched in the magazine's [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 3|third issue]]<ref name="Galaxy3">{{GalaxyCite|3|Design An Alien|Design An Alien Contest}}</ref> in [[April]] [[1995]],<ref name="DateGalaxy3">{{GalaxyCite|2|Rebel Report}}</ref> called for readers to create completely new [[Alien/Legends|alien]] species inspired by the [[original trilogy]] of ''[[Star Wars]]'' films. Fabien was nineteen years of age when he submitted his entry on the Pitrillistians, which was later published in the [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 7|seventh issue]]<ref name="Galaxy7" /> in April [[1996]],<ref name="DateGalaxy7">{{GalaxyCite|6|Around the Galaxy}}</ref> under the "honorable mentions" section of the "16 and up" subdivision.<ref name="Galaxy7" />

[[Lucasfilm]] employee [[Leland Chee]], who maintains the [[Holocron continuity database]], later stated that published material from the "Design An Alien" competition was considered [[canon]] with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="tt">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=690#14724917|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-05-03|time=5:45 PM|quote='''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine #7 published the winners of the 'Design an Alien' contest, where fans were encouraged to submit artwork and backstories of new SW aliens. Are these aliens canon?''' Yes, though any text discrepencies [sic] with other sources would [sic] likely to superceded [sic] by the other source.}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Pitrillistia [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square O-3.<ref name="TEA" />
